data.title: Accident and Injury Attorney Edward M. Graves III clarifies legal claims after accidents in HelloNation article.
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee, on February 17, 2026, a recent article on HelloNation offers guidance on avoiding pitfalls when making personal injury claims post-car accidents. The article advises on the necessary steps for filing claims and cooperating with insurance companies to prevent complications. It aims to assist injury victims in navigating the process effectively.

data.title: Upcoming Canada-India talks on CEPA to finalize after nearly two decades, Prime Ministers to meet in March.
data.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney is set to travel to India in early March to hold talks with Prime Minister Narendra Modi regarding a Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA) between Canada and India. The visit aims to push forward discussions on the long-awaited CEPA, with nearly 20 years of negotiations failing to yield a formal agreement. The anticipated meeting has received strong support for re-energized efforts to conclude the CEPA, highlighting the need for progress in the ongoing negotiations.

data.title: Bitcoin whales struggle underwater as new and old holders diverge. BTC remains under $68K. Will young accumulation surpass older holders?
data.description: As Bitcoin trades at a value of less than $68,000, the disparity between new and established Bitcoin whales grows larger. The question arises: will the younger whales persist in accumulating assets, or will older whales be the first to capitulate?

data.title: EducationDynamics introduces EDDY Intelligence Platform at InsightsEDU Conference, revolutionizing higher ed with AI.
data.description: During the InsightsEDU Conference, participants were introduced to a cutting-edge AI platform designed to revolutionize revenue growth, reputation enhancement, and student support for colleges. EducationDynamics debuted the EDDY platform in Lenexa, Kansas on February 17, 2026. This innovation aims to reshape educational institutions by leveraging advanced technology to cater to the needs of the Modern Learner.

data.title: BKM Capital Partners now owns over 100 light industrial properties, totaling 14M sq ft in 20 US markets.
data.description: BKM Capital Partners, based in Newport Beach, California, recently disclosed that they have acquired and managed over 100 multi-tenant light industrial properties. This establishes them as a prominent dedicated entity in small-bay industrial real estate within the U.S. Their extensive portfolio covers over 14 million square feet distributed across 20 key markets, catering to numerous local and regional enterprises. This achievement signifies their significant presence in the industry landscape.

data.title: Riverview Landscapes acquires Cleveland Brothers Landscaping, Inc., marking its 21st acquisition since 2022. Founded in 1988, Cleveland Brothers has over 30 years of experience in landscaping.
data.description: Riverview Landscapes, based in Corinth, New York, has disclosed the acquisition of Cleveland Brothers Landscaping, Inc., a prominent landscape firm in the region. Cleveland Brothers, founded in 1988 by Terry and Kevin Cleveland, offers a wide range of landscape services in the greater Saratoga Springs area. This acquisition represents Riverview's 21st purchase since 2022, demonstrating their commitment to expansion and growth in the industry. With over 30 years of experience, Cleveland Brothers specializes in landscape maintenance, hardscaping, fertilization, and more.

data.title: AlphaTON Capital sells iOx Therapeutics to Immunova through binding call option.
data.description: AlphaTON Capital has recently finalized a binding call option agreement to sell its legacy biotech asset, iOx Therapeutics, to Immunova. The deal involves a significant sum of money, with the exact amount remaining undisclosed. This transaction marks a key development in the biotech industry, as two prominent companies move forward with a strategic acquisition.

data.title: UNCG, SparkNC, & Guilford County Schools partner to prepare students for tech careers via SparkHub. Bridge between K-12, higher ed, & workforce.
data.description: The establishment of the innovative SparkHub at UNCG in Greensboro, North Carolina on February 17, 2026, marks a pioneering initiative to connect K-12 education, higher education, and the worldwide workforce. This collaborative effort involving SparkNC, UNC Greensboro, and other key stakeholders aims to address the transition challenges individuals face as they move between these educational and professional spheres. This unique platform is poised to have a significant impact by leveraging its influence on a broader scale, bringing together diverse sectors to collectively enhance educational and career opportunities.

data.title: Expert Naomi Bradbury Marchand explains health care directives in Arizona for deathcare decisions.
data.description: In Lake Havasu City, Arizona on February 17, 2026, a recent article by HelloNation discusses the designated individuals authorized to make decisions concerning deathcare in the state. The piece explores Arizona's regulations that dictate who holds the authority in such situations, aiming to prevent confusion among families. It outlines the specific guidelines that govern this process, ensuring clarity and compliance with state laws.

data.title: PenFed Credit Union opens new financial center in St. Thomas, U.S. Virgin Islands, offering great rates and service.
data.description: PenFed Credit Union, a leading federal credit union, has recently inaugurated a state-of-the-art financial center in St. Thomas. The center exemplifies PenFed's dedication to serving the residents by offering competitive rates and top-notch services. Celebrating the launch on Feb. 17, 2026, in Tyson, VA, PenFed is reaffirming its commitment to provide exceptional financial solutions for the community. This marks a significant milestone for PenFed as it continues to expand operations and cater to the needs of customers in St. Thomas.
